widgets.name: Align
widgets.description: A widget that aligns its child within itself and optionally sizes itself based on the child's size.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: How to align the child.

properties.name: widthFactor
properties.description: If non-null, sets its width to the child's width multiplied by this factor.

properties.name: heightFactor
properties.description: If non-null, sets its height to the child's height multiplied by this factor.

widgets.name: AnimatedAlign
widgets.description: Animated version of [Align] which automatically transitions the child's position over a given duration whenever the given [alignment] changes.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: How to align the child.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget below this widget in the tree.

properties.name: heightFactor
properties.description: If non-null, sets its height to the child's height multiplied by this factor.

properties.name: widthFactor
properties.description: If non-null, sets its width to the child's width multiplied by this factor.

widgets.name: RestageFadeIn
widgets.description: Fades [child] in (optionally rising into place) when it first appears.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget that fades in.

properties.name: duration
properties.description: How long the fade takes. Null uses [defaultDuration] (300ms).

properties.name: curve
properties.description: The easing of the fade. Defaults to [Curves.easeOut].

properties.name: fromOpacity
properties.description: The opacity the child fades from. Defaults to `0.0` (fully transparent).

properties.name: fromOffset
properties.description: The translation (in logical pixels) the child rises from. `Offset.zero` (the default) means a pure fade; e.g. `Offset(0, 16)` fades + rises.

properties.name: delay
properties.description: How long to wait after mount before the fade starts. Null means no delay.

properties.name: onEnd
properties.description: Fires once when the fade settles. Never fires if the widget is disposed before settling.

widgets.name: RestageMotion
widgets.description: Springs [child] into place when it first appears.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget that springs into place.

properties.name: spring
properties.description: The named spring feel. Defaults to [RestageSpring.smooth].

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Optional override for the preset's settle duration. Null keeps the preset's duration. Independent of [bounce] — overriding one leaves the other at the preset's value.

properties.name: bounce
properties.description: Optional override for the preset's bounce (overshoot). Null keeps the preset's bounce. Independent of [duration]. Clamped internally so no value can produce a non-settling spring.

properties.name: fromScale
properties.description: The scale the child animates from. `1.0` (the default) means no scale animation; `< 1.0` pops in, `> 1.0` shrinks in.

properties.name: fromOpacity
properties.description: The opacity the child animates from. `1.0` (the default) means no fade; `0.0` fades in.

properties.name: fromOffset
properties.description: The translation (in logical pixels) the child animates from. `Offset.zero` (the default) means no slide; e.g. `Offset(0, 24)` rises into place.

properties.name: delay
properties.description: How long to wait after mount before the entrance starts. Null means no delay (start immediately).

properties.name: onEnd
properties.description: Fires once when the entrance settles. Never fires if the widget is disposed before settling.

widgets.name: RestagePrice
widgets.description: Locale-aware currency formatting, rendered as text.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The amount to format. Null renders the empty string.

properties.name: numberLocale
properties.description: The locale whose conventions govern number formatting — grouping, the decimal mark, digit shaping, and symbol placement (e.g. `en_US`, `de_DE`, `ja_JP`). Null uses the ambient default locale.

properties.name: symbol
properties.description: The currency symbol or sign to show (e.g. `$`, `€`, `¥`). Null uses the locale's default currency symbol.

properties.name: decimalDigits
properties.description: The number of fraction digits (e.g. `2` for most currencies, `0` for JPY, `3` for KWD). Null uses the locale's default for the currency.

properties.description: Horizontal alignment of the rendered value.

properties.name: maxLines

widgets.name: RestagePulse
widgets.description: Continuously pulses [child] between [minScale] and [maxScale] to draw attention — a subtle "breathing" effect for a call-to-action.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget that pulses.

properties.name: minScale
properties.description: The smallest scale in the pulse. Defaults to a subtle `0.97`.

properties.name: maxScale
properties.description: The largest scale in the pulse. Defaults to a subtle `1.03`.

properties.name: period
properties.description: The duration of a single sweep between [minScale] and [maxScale]; a full pulse (out and back) takes two sweeps. Null uses [defaultPeriod] (1200ms).

properties.name: curve
properties.description: The easing of each sweep. Defaults to [Curves.easeInOut].

widgets.name: RestageStagger
widgets.description: Reveals a vertical list of [children] with a cascading entrance — each child springs into place ([RestageMotion]'s entrance), delayed by [delayBetween] times its index, so the list flows in rather than appearing at once.

properties.name: children
properties.description: The children revealed in order, top to bottom.

properties.name: delayBetween
properties.description: The delay added per child — child `i` starts after `delayBetween * i`. Null uses [defaultDelayBetween] (60ms). Clamped to a safe range so a pathological value cannot overflow the per-child delay.

properties.name: spring
properties.description: The spring feel each child enters with. Defaults to [RestageSpring.smooth].

properties.name: fromOffset
properties.description: The translation (in logical pixels) each child enters from. Defaults to `Offset.zero` (a pure fade stagger).

properties.name: fromOpacity
properties.description: The opacity each child enters from. Defaults to `0.0` (fade in).

properties.name: fromScale
properties.description: The scale each child enters from. Defaults to `1.0` (no scale).

widgets.name: Opacity
widgets.description: A widget that makes its child partially transparent.

properties.name: opacity
properties.description: The fraction to scale the child's alpha value.

properties.name: alwaysIncludeSemantics
properties.description: Whether the semantic information of the children is always included.

widgets.name: Padding
widgets.description: A widget that insets its child by the given padding.

properties.name: padding
properties.description: The amount of space by which to inset the child.

widgets.name: Positioned
widgets.description: A widget that controls where a child of a [Stack] is positioned.

properties.name: left
properties.description: The distance that the child's left edge is inset from the left of the stack.

properties.name: top
properties.description: The distance that the child's top edge is inset from the top of the stack.

properties.name: right
properties.description: The distance that the child's right edge is inset from the right of the stack.

properties.name: bottom
properties.description: The distance that the child's bottom edge is inset from the bottom of the stack.

properties.name: width
properties.description: The child's width.

properties.name: height
properties.description: The child's height.

widgets.name: Row
widgets.description: A widget that displays its children in a horizontal array.

widgets.name: RotatedBox
widgets.description: A widget that rotates its child by a integral number of quarter turns.

properties.name: quarterTurns
properties.description: The number of clockwise quarter turns the child should be rotated.

widgets.name: SafeArea
widgets.description: A widget that insets its child with sufficient padding to avoid intrusions by the operating system.

properties.name: left
properties.description: Whether to avoid system intrusions on the left.

properties.name: top
properties.description: Whether to avoid system intrusions at the top of the screen, typically the system status bar.

properties.name: right
properties.description: Whether to avoid system intrusions on the right.

properties.name: bottom
properties.description: Whether to avoid system intrusions on the bottom side of the screen.

properties.name: maintainBottomViewPadding
properties.description: Specifies whether the [SafeArea] should maintain the bottom [MediaQueryData.viewPadding] instead of the bottom [MediaQueryData.padding], defaults to false.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget below this widget in the tree.

widgets.name: SingleChildScrollView
widgets.description: A box in which a single widget can be scrolled.

properties.name: scrollDirection
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.scroll_view.scrollDirection}

properties.name: reverse
properties.description: Whether the scroll view scrolls in the reading direction.

properties.name: padding
properties.description: The amount of space by which to inset the child.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget that scrolls.

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

properties.name: keyboardDismissBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.scroll_view.keyboardDismissBehavior}

widgets.name: SizedBox
widgets.description: A box with a specified size.

properties.name: width
properties.description: If non-null, requires the child to have exactly this width.

properties.name: height
properties.description: If non-null, requires the child to have exactly this height.

widgets.name: Spacer
widgets.description: Spacer creates an adjustable, empty spacer that can be used to tune the spacing between widgets in a [Flex] container, like [Row] or [Column].

properties.name: flex
properties.description: The flex factor to use in determining how much space to take up.

widgets.name: Stack
widgets.description: A widget that positions its children relative to the edges of its box.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: How to align the non-positioned and partially-positioned children in the stack.

properties.name: fit
properties.description: How to size the non-positioned children in the stack.

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

widgets.name: Text
widgets.description: Static text with optional styling.

properties.name: text
properties.description: The text to display.

properties.name: textAlign
properties.description: How the text should be aligned horizontally.

properties.name: softWrap
properties.description: Whether the text should break at soft line breaks.

properties.name: maxLines
properties.description: An optional maximum number of lines for the text to span, wrapping if necessary. If the text exceeds the given number of lines, it will be truncated according to [overflow].

properties.name: semanticsLabel
properties.description: {@template flutter.widgets.Text.semanticsLabel} An alternative semantics label for this text.

properties.name: textWidthBasis
properties.description: {@macro flutter.painting.textPainter.textWidthBasis}

properties.name: inherit
properties.description: Whether unset text style values inherit from the parent.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Text color.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: Text background color.

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.description: Primary font family.

properties.name: fontSize
properties.description: Font size in logical pixels.

properties.name: fontWeight
properties.description: Font weight.

properties.name: fontStyle
properties.description: Font posture.

properties.name: letterSpacing
properties.description: Horizontal spacing between text glyphs.

properties.name: wordSpacing
properties.description: Horizontal spacing between words.

properties.name: textBaseline
properties.description: Baseline used to align text.

properties.name: height
properties.description: Text line height multiplier.

properties.name: leadingDistribution
properties.description: How leading is distributed above and below text.

properties.name: locale
properties.description: Locale used for font selection.

properties.name: foreground
properties.description: Paint used to draw text glyphs.

properties.name: background
properties.description: Paint used behind text glyphs.

properties.name: shadows
properties.description: Shadows painted beneath text glyphs.

properties.name: fontFeatures
properties.description: OpenType font features.

properties.name: fontVariations
properties.description: OpenType font variation axis values.

properties.name: decoration
properties.description: Text decoration lines.

properties.name: decorationColor
properties.description: Text decoration color.

properties.name: decorationStyle
properties.description: Text decoration stroke style.

properties.name: decorationThickness
properties.description: Text decoration stroke thickness.

properties.name: debugLabel
properties.description: Debug label for this text style.

properties.name: fontFamilyFallback
properties.description: Fallback font families.

properties.name: fontPackage
properties.description: Package that contains the custom font family.

properties.name: overflow
properties.description: Text overflow behavior.

widgets.name: TextRich
widgets.description: Rich text — a styled inline-span tree with optional styling.

properties.name: textSpan
properties.description: The text to display as a [InlineSpan].

properties.name: textAlign
properties.description: How the text should be aligned horizontally.

properties.name: softWrap
properties.description: Whether the text should break at soft line breaks.

properties.name: maxLines
properties.description: An optional maximum number of lines for the text to span, wrapping if necessary. If the text exceeds the given number of lines, it will be truncated according to [overflow].

properties.name: semanticsLabel
properties.description: {@template flutter.widgets.Text.semanticsLabel} An alternative semantics label for this text.

properties.name: textWidthBasis
properties.description: {@macro flutter.painting.textPainter.textWidthBasis}

properties.name: inherit
properties.description: Whether unset text style values inherit from the parent.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Text color.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: Text background color.

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.description: Primary font family.

properties.name: fontSize
properties.description: Font size in logical pixels.

properties.name: fontWeight
properties.description: Font weight.

properties.name: fontStyle
properties.description: Font posture.

properties.name: letterSpacing
properties.description: Horizontal spacing between text glyphs.

properties.name: wordSpacing
properties.description: Horizontal spacing between words.

properties.name: textBaseline
properties.description: Baseline used to align text.

properties.name: height
properties.description: Text line height multiplier.

properties.name: leadingDistribution
properties.description: How leading is distributed above and below text.

properties.name: locale
properties.description: Locale used for font selection.

properties.name: foreground
properties.description: Paint used to draw text glyphs.

properties.name: background
properties.description: Paint used behind text glyphs.

properties.name: shadows
properties.description: Shadows painted beneath text glyphs.

properties.name: fontFeatures
properties.description: OpenType font features.

properties.name: fontVariations
properties.description: OpenType font variation axis values.

properties.name: decoration
properties.description: Text decoration lines.

properties.name: decorationColor
properties.description: Text decoration color.

properties.name: decorationStyle
properties.description: Text decoration stroke style.

properties.name: decorationThickness
properties.description: Text decoration stroke thickness.

properties.name: debugLabel
properties.description: Debug label for this text style.

properties.name: fontFamilyFallback
properties.description: Fallback font families.

properties.name: fontPackage
properties.description: Package that contains the custom font family.

properties.name: overflow
properties.description: Text overflow behavior.

widgets.name: TransformRotate
widgets.description: A widget that applies a transformation before painting its child.

properties.name: origin
properties.description: The origin of the coordinate system in which to apply the matrix, described relative to the point given by [alignment].

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: The alignment of the origin, relative to the size of the box.

properties.name: transformHitTests
properties.description: Whether to transform registered hits into the child's resulting coordinate system.

properties.name: filterQuality
properties.description: The filter quality with which to apply the transform as a bitmap operation.

widgets.name: Visibility
widgets.description: Whether to show or hide a child.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget to show or hide, as controlled by [visible].

properties.name: visible
properties.description: Switches between showing the [child] or hiding it.

properties.name: maintainFocusability
properties.description: Whether to allow the widget to receive focus when hidden. Only in effect if [visible] is false.

widgets.name: Wrap
widgets.description: A widget that displays its children in multiple horizontal or vertical runs.

properties.name: direction
properties.description: The direction to use as the main axis.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: How the children within a run should be placed in the main axis.

properties.name: spacing
properties.description: How much space to place between children in a run in the main axis.

properties.name: runAlignment
properties.description: How the runs themselves should be placed in the cross axis.

properties.name: runSpacing
properties.description: How much space to place between the runs themselves in the cross axis.

properties.name: crossAxisAlignment
properties.description: How the children within a run should be aligned relative to each other in the cross axis.

properties.name: textDirection
properties.description: Determines the order to lay children out horizontally and how to interpret `start` and `end` in the horizontal direction.

properties.name: verticalDirection
properties.description: Determines the order to lay children out vertically and how to interpret `start` and `end` in the vertical direction.

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

structuredTypes.name: Decoration
structuredTypes.description: A description of a box decoration (a decoration applied to a [Rect]).

structuredTypes.name: BoxDecoration
structuredTypes.description: An immutable description of how to paint a box.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color to fill in the background of the box.

fields.name: border
fields.description: A border to draw above the background [color], [gradient], or [image].

fields.name: gradient
fields.description: A gradient to use when filling the box.

fields.name: backgroundBlendMode
fields.description: The blend mode applied to the [color] or [gradient] background of the box.

fields.name: shape
fields.description: The shape to fill the background [color], [gradient], and [image] into and to cast as the [boxShadow].

fields.name: image
fields.description: Background image painted behind the child (NetworkImage / AssetImage supported).

fields.name: borderRadius
fields.description: Uniform corner radius applied to all four corners.

fields.name: boxShadow
fields.description: List of shadows painted behind the box.

variants.description: Linearly interpolate between two box decorations.

structuredTypes.name: BoxShadow
structuredTypes.description: BoxShadow value.

structuredTypes.name: BorderRadius
structuredTypes.description: BorderRadius value.

structuredTypes.name: BoxConstraints
structuredTypes.description: BoxConstraints value.

fields.name: minWidth
fields.description: Minimum width the box may have.

fields.name: maxWidth
fields.description: Maximum width the box may have.

fields.name: minHeight
fields.description: Minimum height the box may have.

fields.name: maxHeight
fields.description: Maximum height the box may have.

structuredTypes.name: TextStyle
structuredTypes.description: An immutable style describing how to format and paint text.

fields.name: inherit
fields.description: Whether null values in this [TextStyle] can be replaced with their value in another [TextStyle] using [merge].

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color to use when painting the text.

fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.description: The color to use as the background for the text.

fields.name: fontFamily
fields.description: The name of the font to use when painting the text (e.g., Roboto).

fields.name: fontFamilyFallback
fields.description: Fallback font families.

fields.name: fontSize
fields.description: The size of fonts (in logical pixels) to use when painting the text.

fields.name: fontWeight
fields.description: The typeface thickness to use when painting the text (e.g., bold).

fields.name: fontStyle
fields.description: The typeface variant to use when drawing the letters (e.g., italics).

fields.name: letterSpacing
fields.description: The amount of space (in logical pixels) to add between each letter. A negative value can be used to bring the letters closer.

fields.name: wordSpacing
fields.description: The amount of space (in logical pixels) to add at each sequence of white-space (i.e. between each word). A negative value can be used to bring the words closer.

fields.name: height
fields.description: The height of this text span, as a multiple of the font size.

fields.name: leadingDistribution
fields.description: How the vertical space added by the [height] multiplier should be distributed over and under the text.

fields.name: foreground
fields.description: The paint drawn as a foreground for the text.

fields.name: background
fields.description: The paint drawn as a background for the text.

fields.name: decoration
fields.description: The decorations to paint near the text (e.g., an underline).

fields.name: decorationColor
fields.description: The color in which to paint the text decorations.

fields.name: decorationStyle
fields.description: The style in which to paint the text decorations (e.g., dashed).

fields.name: decorationThickness
fields.description: The thickness of the decoration stroke as a multiplier of the thickness defined by the font.

fields.name: debugLabel
fields.description: A human-readable description of this text style.

fields.name: shadows
fields.description: A list of [Shadow]s that will be painted underneath the text.

fields.name: fontFeatures
fields.description: A list of [FontFeature]s that affect how the font selects glyphs.

fields.name: fontVariations
fields.description: A list of [FontVariation]s that affect how a variable font is rendered.

fields.name: overflow
fields.description: How visual text overflow should be handled.

fields.name: textBaseline
fields.description: Baseline used to align text.

fields.name: locale
fields.description: Locale used for font selection.

variants.description: Interpolate between two text styles for animated transitions.

structuredTypes.name: Shadow
structuredTypes.description: Shadow value.

structuredTypes.name: FontFeature
structuredTypes.description: FontFeature value.

structuredTypes.name: FontVariation
structuredTypes.description: FontVariation value.

structuredTypes.name: String
structuredTypes.description: String value.

structuredTypes.name: Border
structuredTypes.description: A border of a box, comprised of four sides: top, right, bottom, left.

fields.name: right
fields.description: The right side of this border.

fields.name: left
fields.description: The left side of this border.

variants.description: A uniform border with all sides the same color and width.
Creates a border whose sides are all the same.
Creates a border with symmetrical vertical and horizontal sides.
Creates a [Border] that represents the addition of the two given [Border]s.

structuredTypes.name: BorderDirectional
structuredTypes.description: A border of a box, comprised of four sides, the lateral sides of which flip over based on the reading direction.

fields.name: start
fields.description: The start side of this border.

fields.name: end
fields.description: The end side of this border.

variants.description: Creates a [BorderDirectional] that represents the addition of the two given [BorderDirectional]s.

structuredTypes.name: BorderSide
structuredTypes.description: A side of a border of a box.

structuredTypes.name: LinearGradient
structuredTypes.description: A 2D linear gradient.

fields.name: begin
fields.description: The offset at which stop 0.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: end
fields.description: The offset at which stop 1.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane beyond in the region before [begin] and after [end].

structuredTypes.name: RadialGradient
structuredTypes.description: A 2D radial gradient.

fields.name: center
fields.description: The center of the gradient, as an offset into the (-1.0, -1.0) x (1.0, 1.0) square describing the gradient which will be mapped onto the paint box.

fields.name: radius
fields.description: The radius of the gradient, as a fraction of the shortest side of the paint box.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane beyond the outer ring at [radius] pixels from the [center].

fields.name: focal
fields.description: The focal point of the gradient. If specified, the gradient will appear to be focused along the vector from [center] to focal.

fields.name: focalRadius
fields.description: The radius of the focal point of gradient, as a fraction of the shortest side of the paint box.

structuredTypes.name: SweepGradient
structuredTypes.description: A 2D sweep gradient.

fields.name: center
fields.description: The center of the gradient, as an offset into the (-1.0, -1.0) x (1.0, 1.0) square describing the gradient which will be mapped onto the paint box.

fields.name: startAngle
fields.description: The angle in radians at which stop 0.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: endAngle
fields.description: The angle in radians at which stop 1.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane in the region before [startAngle] and after [endAngle].

structuredTypes.name: ShapeDecoration
structuredTypes.description: An immutable description of how to paint an arbitrary shape.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color to fill in the background of the shape.

fields.name: gradient
fields.description: A gradient to use when filling the shape.

fields.name: shape
fields.description: The shape to fill the [color], [gradient], and [image] into and to cast as the [shadows].

variants.description: Creates a shape decoration configured to match a [BoxDecoration].

structuredTypes.name: RoundedRectangleBorder
structuredTypes.description: A rectangular border with rounded corners.

structuredTypes.name: RoundedSuperellipseBorder
structuredTypes.description: A rectangular border with rounded corners following the shape of an [RSuperellipse].

structuredTypes.name: CircleBorder
structuredTypes.description: A border that fits a circle within the available space.

fields.name: eccentricity
fields.description: Defines the ratio (0.0-1.0) from which the border will deform to fit a rectangle. When 0.0, it draws a circle touching at least two sides of the rectangle. When 1.0, it draws an oval touching all sides of the rectangle.

structuredTypes.name: StadiumBorder
structuredTypes.description: A border that fits a stadium-shaped border (a box with semicircles on the ends) within the rectangle of the widget it is applied to.

structuredTypes.name: ContinuousRectangleBorder
structuredTypes.description: A rectangular border with smooth continuous transitions between the straight sides and the rounded corners.

structuredTypes.name: BeveledRectangleBorder
structuredTypes.description: A rectangular border with flattened or "beveled" corners.

variants.description: Creates a border like a [RoundedRectangleBorder] except that the corners are joined by straight lines instead of arcs.

structuredTypes.name: LinearBorder
structuredTypes.description: An [OutlinedBorder] like [BoxBorder] that allows one to define a rectangular (box) border in terms of zero to four [LinearBorderEdge]s, each of which is rendered as a single line.

fields.name: start
fields.description: Defines the left edge for [TextDirection.ltr] or the right for [TextDirection.rtl].

fields.name: end
fields.description: Defines the right edge for [TextDirection.ltr] or the left for [TextDirection.rtl].

fields.name: top
fields.description: Defines the top edge.

fields.name: bottom
fields.description: Defines the bottom edge.

variants.description: Creates a rectangular box border that's rendered as zero to four lines.
Creates a rectangular box border with an edge on the bottom.
Creates a rectangular box border with an edge on the right for [TextDirection.ltr] or on the left for [TextDirection.rtl].
Creates a rectangular box border with an edge on the left for [TextDirection.ltr] or on the right for [TextDirection.rtl].
Creates a rectangular box border with an edge on the top.

structuredTypes.name: StarBorder
structuredTypes.description: A border that fits a star or polygon-shaped border within the rectangle of the widget it is applied to.

fields.name: points
fields.description: The number of points in this star, or sides on a polygon.

fields.name: pointRounding
fields.description: The amount of rounding on the points of stars, or the corners of polygons.

fields.name: valleyRounding
fields.description: The amount of rounding of the interior corners of stars.

fields.name: squash
fields.description: How much of the aspect ratio of the attached widget to take on.

variants.description: Create a const star-shaped border with the given number [points] on the star.
Create a const polygon border with the given number of [sides].

structuredTypes.name: LinearBorderEdge
structuredTypes.description: Defines the relative size and alignment of one [LinearBorder] edge.

unions.name: BoxBorder
unions.description: A box border: uniform or per-side Border, or text-direction-aware BorderDirectional.

unions.name: Gradient
unions.description: A color gradient: linear, radial, or sweep.

unions.name: Decoration
unions.description: A box decoration: BoxDecoration or ShapeDecoration.

unions.name: ShapeBorder
unions.description: A shape border: rounded, superellipse, circle, stadium, continuous, beveled, linear, or star.
